items.name: (1.0) Snow Kawaii White Kitty Shoulder Pet
items.description:
Let this fluffy little cloud rest on your shoulder with the Snow Kawaii White Kitty Shoulder Pet. This stretching white cat, with soft pink ears and a cute blushy face, adds a sweet kitty, neko and pastel kawaii vibe to any outfit. Perfect for soft girl looks, cozy sweaters, pastel skirts and aesthetic styles when you want an adorable white kitty riding on your shoulder everywhere you go.

👇 Don’t forget to favorite if you like it!

✨ For more items and matching sets, check my catalog and group!

https://www.roblox.com/communities/35847984/PuffmallowUGC#!/store

items.name: Crimson Aristocrat Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🕯️ Commanding elegance born of midnight and wine.
This black and crimson tailcoat radiates noble dominance and dark refinement. Golden trim and rich red lapels emphasize its theatrical, vampiric charm — perfect for avatars of charisma and control.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Sharp silhouette with regal gold detailing
Red and black contrast for timeless authority
Ideal for vampire, noble, or steampunk aesthetics
PBR materials add realistic satin sheen and fabric depth
🔍 Keywords: coat, red, black, noble, vampire, elegant, gothic, formal, PBR, tailcoat
Power whispered, not shouted — sophistication in shadow.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.
